author: kubernetes-prow[bot]
message:
Merge pull request #2142 from saschagrunert/fix-inspect-flag-names

crictl: Fix CLI flag names in inspect fallback path

author: kubernetes-prow[bot]
message:
Merge pull request #2141 from saschagrunert/precompile-regex-patterns

crictl: Pre-compile regex patterns for name and namespace filters

author: Sascha Grunert
message:
crictl: Fix CLI flag names in inspect fallback path

The inspect command's fallback to container listing used c.String("^name$")
and c.String("^namespace$"), which look up non-existent flags instead of
the defined "name" and "namespace" flags. This caused the name and namespace
filters to always be empty in the inspect code path.

Signed-off-by: Sascha Grunert <sgrunert@redhat.com>

author: Sascha Grunert
message:
crictl: Pre-compile regex patterns for name and namespace filters

Compile user-supplied regular expressions once before filtering
instead of re-compiling on every item in the list. This surfaces
invalid regex errors to the user immediately rather than silently
treating them as non-matches.

Signed-off-by: Sascha Grunert <sgrunert@redhat.com>

author: Sergey Kanzhelev
message:
fix: touch zizmor binary after extraction to prevent repeated downloads

tar preserves the archive's original timestamp, which can be older than
the prerequisite directory. Without touch, Make considers the target
out-of-date on every invocation and re-downloads it.
